headline: This Week In E-Commerce - Shopify's Q2 2026 Financial Results Announcement Insights
summary: Shopify Inc. is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026, with the announcement scheduled for August 5 before market open. A conference call hosted by Shopify's management will follow to discuss the results, available via webcast on the company's Investor Relations website. This announcement aligns with Shopify's ongoing role as a provider of essential internet infrastructure for commerce, supporting millions of businesses worldwide. The upcoming financial...

headline: Stay updated with the S&P500 stocks that are on the move in today's pre-market session.
summary: Before the opening bell on Thursday, let's take a glimpse of the US markets and explore the S&P500 top gainers and losers in today's pre-market session.

headline: What To Expect From June's Inflation Report As Chip Prices Rise, Energy Falls
summary: Memory inflation, driven by OpenAI's massive DRAM orders and supply constraints, is expected to persist until at least 2028. Read more here.
